data.body:
Mike did not ruin Ludum Dare, that's not what the post is about.

At most it's about how Ludum Dare could have been in a better state, and how it's legacy might come to ruin. A legacy that Mike expressed he wishes to continue.

I have said my piece. Excited to participate in Ludum Dare this weekend!
